hero.title: Connecting the local talent of
hero.subtitle: We were born with a clear mission: use technology to connect professionals with those who need their services, strengthening the local economy in every country we operate in.

story.label: Our Story
story.title: More than an App
story.description: Atlas Services is not a multinational. We are a team of entrepreneurs who understood that the best way to grow is by connecting professionals with those who need them.

values.title: Our Values
values.subtitle: What drives us every day to improve the platform.

items.title: Local Identity
items.desc: We understand the reality of each country. We adapt the platform to the local needs of each market.

items.title: Trust
items.desc: We validate identities and promote real reviews. We want contracting to be safe and transparent.

items.title: Community
items.desc: Every payment for a service stays in the local community. We support entrepreneurship and traditional trades.

stats.label: Real Impact
stats.title: Growing alongside the community
stats.description: In the last year, we have helped more than 500 families find quick solutions for their homes, generating direct income for hundreds of local professionals.
stats.quote: We created this platform because we saw the need for a modern, organized and reliable professional directory for Latin America.
